campaign.name: Lumen — Spring Reset Collection
campaign.message: Wake up your skin. Spring starts here.
campaign.targetAudience: Skincare-focused millennials and Gen X 25-44, ingredient-conscious, prefer clinical-but-natural brands
campaign.tone: fresh, clean, dewy, soft-light studio, science-meets-botanical

products.name: Lumen Vitamin C Brightening Serum
products.description: 15% L-ascorbic acid serum with ferulic acid and vitamin E. Brightens, evens tone, fights early signs of aging. Vegan, dermatologist-tested.

products.name: Lumen Hyaluronic Hydration Mist
products.description: Triple-weight hyaluronic acid mist with rose water and aloe. Layerable hydration boost for any time of day. Recyclable aluminum bottle.

products.name: Lumen Niacinamide Pore Refining Cream
products.description: 10% niacinamide cream with zinc PCA and green tea extract. Refines pores, balances oil, calms redness. Lightweight gel-cream texture.
